instruction: Plan the resolution of case 5: close it (resolution summary 'Issue resolved'), set its priority to 'Low' once closed, and notify the primary contact of the case's account by email with subject 'Case 5 closed' and a brief body.
rationale_hint: Case 5 has transfer_count 2, so attempt_close_case is permitted; priority needs a separate db_update; one notification email to the primary contact of account 4.

provenance.source_benchmark: PlanBench (Valmeekam et al., 2023); FlowBench plan-generation variant (Xiao et al., 2024); WorkArena L2 compositional (Boisvert et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed scenario over the local CRM seed; mechanical plan validation, plan-length difficulty, and temperature 0 follow PlanBench; plan-generation framing follows FlowBench and WorkArena L2. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: close_notify.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (scenarios, goal specs, action doc); benchmark semantics reference only
